The '''Zann Consortium Vehicle Factory''' was a modular structure within [[Tyber Zann]]'s underworld empire. They were built with to be created on a planet relatively quickly, however, with defenses in mind which included built-in armor and a shield generator. They were similar to the [[Zann Consortium Droid Works]] in that they were well shielded from most types of weaponry. When fully functional, these factories can produce a wide variety of vehicles which included the [[MZ-8 Mobile Pulse Cannon]], [[Missile Attack Launcher]], [[Canderous-class assault tank|''Canderous''-class assault tank]], and the [[F9-TZ Transport]].
